Container.Name: AgenticSeek-Redis
Container.Overview: Valkey (Redis-compatible) cache used by AgenticSeek. This is a required companion container. Valkey is an open-source, high-performance key/value datastore that stores session data and caches. Start this container first before the other AgenticSeek containers.
Container.Requires: Start this container first — it must be running before AgenticSeek-Backend is started.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Path where Valkey persists its data to disk. Data is saved every 30 seconds if at least 1 key has changed.
